riesgoPaisEMBI.note: Ambito latest 503 (+1.00% d/d). IAMC/BYMA 09-Jun report chart shows ~487 for early-Jun close; small vintage/index-family discrepancy flagged.

policyRate.note: BCRA's explicit policy-rate series (idVariable 160/161) was DISCONTINUED on 2025-07-10 (last value 29.0% TNA / 33.63% TEA). As of 2026-06-10 there is no single posted policy rate; monetary policy operates via aggregates with rates set in market operations.

rem.note: REM publishes monthly medians only ~7 months ahead; months Dec-2026..May-2027 NOT interpolated (rule: no invented numbers). Use 12m/annual medians for longer horizons.

fxRegime.description: Crawling FX band (bandas cambiarias) still in force as of 2026-06-10. BCRA publishes official daily band limits: limite inferior 783.97, limite superior 1776.27 (2026-06-10). A3500 spot 1436.585 trades well inside the band.
fxRegime.observedCrawl: DERIVED from official series (ids 1187/1188): ceiling rises ~+1.51/1.52 ARS per calendar day (~+0.086%/day); floor falls ~-0.69 ARS per day (~-0.088%/day).
fxRegime.secondary: IAMC 09-Jun report plots LECAP breakeven A3500 vs bandas: techo ~1,800 mid-2026, REM-extrapolated ~2,030 by Jan-2027

settlement.standard: Contado 24hs (T+1) is the standard settlement for bonds/letters on BYMA; Contado Inmediato (CI) also trades (bonistas quotes both CI and 24hs rows).
evidence: BYMA Comunicado 18782 hours table lists 'Contado 24 hs.' as regular spot plus 'Contado Inmediato'
IAMC informe of 09-Jun-2026 prices everything to 'Fecha de Liquidacion: 10/06/2026'

tradingHours.pptRegular: 10:30-17:00 ART (opening auction 10:25-10:30; closing auction 16:57-17:00; negociacion a precio de cierre 17:05-17:15)

yieldConvention.tir: IAMC/BYMA YTM = IRR equating DIRTY price (cierre) to PV of cashflows with compound discounting (1+y)^tau -> EFFECTIVE ANNUAL rate. Year fraction tau per instrument contract day count: 30/360, ACT/365 or ACT/ACT.
yieldConvention.tnaTeaTem: TNA = period yield x 360/days (linear); TEA = (1+period yield)^(1/tau)-1; TEM=(1+TEA)^(1/12)-1. LECAP table publishes all three.
yieldConvention.duration: MD = Macaulay/(1+YTM); 'DM (Dias)' = MD_years x base (360 or 365). CER instruments: YTM published is the REAL yield over CER-adjusted flows.

usdSovereignPayments.couponsCurrency: USD - IAMC table column 'Moneda Pago' = USD for AO27/AL29/AL30/GD30/AE38/AL35/GD35/AL41/GD41/GD46 and all BOPREAL.
usdSovereignPayments.tickerVariants: Same bond trades as ARS ticker (AL30, settles pesos), D ticker (AL30D, settles USD local/MEP) and C ticker (AL30C, settles USD cable/CCL); coupons are paid in USD regardless.
usdSovereignPayments.minimumLotsFlag: Lamina minima / minimum VN for ARS vs D tickers NOT confirmed from a fetchable primary source today - set to null. Decreto 391/2020 annex text could not be retrieved (InfoLeg API 403/token; argentina.gob.ar ID mismatch).

conventions.quoteBasis: BYMA bond prices quoted per 100 VN (ARS tickers in pesos per 100 VN; D/C tickers in USD per 100 VN). LECAP/BONCAP/CER quoted ARS per VN 100. IAMC analytics use dirty price; for restructured globales the USD analytic price is paridad% x valor tecnico on original 100 face (AL30 VR=72.0 after amortizations).

bymaDerechosDeMercado.ivaNote: IVA NOT added on operations in Valores Negociables Publicos and Obligaciones Negociables (exempt); others +IVA.

IOL.tierRule: tier by prior-month traded volume: gold <= ARS 7.5M, platinum to 50M, black above
IOL.iva: Titulos publicos, Letras del Tesoro y ONs exentos de IVA

Cocos.flag: cocos.capital fee page returns 403 (Cloudflare) to non-browser fetch; not verifiable today

Balanz.flag: balanz.com aranceles table is JS-rendered; values not present in fetched HTML; not verifiable today

fees.typicalRetailRange: Verified anchor: IOL 0.1%-0.5% per side on bonds (volume-tiered) + BYMA derecho 0.01% (titulos publicos, IVA-exempt). Range for Cocos/Balanz not confirmed - see flags.

flags: IAMC golden values are 2026-06-09 close (priced to settlement 2026-06-10); today's (06-10) IAMC informe was not yet published at fetch time (~18:35 ART). bonistas.com cross-checks are same-day 2026-06-10.
Riesgo pais: Ambito shows 503 bps (2026-06-10) while the IAMC 09-Jun chart shows ~487 for early June; vintage/index-family mismatch - validate against JP Morgan EMBI directly if precision needed.

CER short-end TIR diverges across sources (TZXM7: IAMC 2.82% vs bonistas 1.33%) - CER coefficient projection convention differs; calibrate engine to the IAMC convention (real IRR vs CER-adjusted technical value).
BCRA policy-rate series discontinued 2025-07-10 (last 29% TNA); no single policy rate exists as of 2026-06-10 - TAMAR 21.5% TNA and o/n repo terceros 20.13% TNA recorded instead.
REM monthly inflation medians available only May-2026..Nov-2026; remaining months of the next-12m window NOT interpolated; 12-month median 23.32% i.a. (to May-2027).
Minimum lots / lamina minima for ARS vs D tickers: null - no fetchable primary source confirmed today (InfoLeg blocked, BYMA especies list not located).
Cocos and Balanz fee schedules unfetchable (Cloudflare 403 / JS-rendered) - only IOL tariffs verified.
bonistas.com 'description' metadata contains errors (e.g., labels AL30 bullet although it amortizes, VR 72.0 per IAMC) - use its numeric analytics fields only, not descriptions.
FX band crawl rates are DERIVED from the official BCRA daily band series, not from a fetched comunicado; parameterization (e.g., monthly %) should be re-derived from series ids 1187/1188 as needed.
